Afghanistan.notes: Visa is not required in case born in Afghanistan or can proof that one of their parents is a national of Afghanistan or born in Afghanistan.. e-Visa: Visitors must arrive at Kabul International (KBL)..

Albania.notes: Visa-free for Schengen, US, UK multiple-entry visa or residence permit holders, which has been previously used in the respective country of issuance..

Algeria.notes: Visitors on tours organized to some southern regions by an approved travel agency may obtain a visa on arrival for up to 30 days..

Andorra.notes: There are no visa requirements for entry into Andorra, but it can only be accessed by passing through France or Spain. A multiple entry visa is required to re-enter either France or Spain when leaving Andorra.. All visitors can stay for 3 months..

Antigua and Barbuda.notes: Holders of a visa or residency issued by Canada, USA, United Kingdom or a Schengen Member State can obtain a visa upon arrival that costs USD 100 for a maximum of 30 days..

Argentina.notes: The AVE (High Speed Travel) is open to Vietnamese citizens holding valid, current ordinary passports traveling to Argentina for tourism. To do so, they must hold a valid category B2/J/B1/O/P (P1-P2-P3)/E/H-1B visa issued by the United States of America..

Australia.notes: May apply online (Online Visitor e600 visa)..

Azerbaijan.notes: Travellers with Artsakh visa (expired or valid) or evidence of travel to Artsakh (stamps) will be permanently denied entry to Azerbaijan..

Belarus.notes: 30 days per visit, maximum 90 days within a year.

Belize.notes: Visa-free for holders of valid visa for Schengen area up to 90 days or holders of multiple-entry US visa for up to 30 days..

Benin.notes: Must have an international vaccination certificate.. Three types of electronic visa are offered: the e-Visa valid for 30 days for a single entry (50 EUR), the e-Visa valid for 30 days for several (multiple) entries (75 EUR), and the e-Visa valid for 90 days to make several (multiple) entries (100 EUR)..

Bhutan.notes: The Sustainable Development Fee (SDF) of 200 USD per person, per night for almost all visitors to Bhutan. Additionally, if payment is made in US dollars from September 1, 2023 to August 31, 2027, the SDF is 100 USD..

Bosnia and Herzegovina.notes: Visa free for holders of valid visa for Schengen area..

Bulgaria.notes: Visa free for holders of valid visa for Schengen area..

China.notes: Visa not required for 'Public affairs' passport.. 24-hour visa-free transit through any international airports of China, allows domestic travel through different airports..

Colombia.notes: Visa free for holders of valid visa for Schengen area or the US..

Costa Rica.notes: Visa-free for holders of valid visa for Schengen area or the US..

Côte d'Ivoire.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Port Bouet Airport..

Cuba.notes: Can be extended up to 90 days with a fee..

Cyprus.notes: Visa-free for holders of valid visa for Schengen area..

Ethiopia.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Addis Ababa Bole International Airport.

Gabon.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Libreville International Airport..

Gambia.notes: An entry clearance must be obtained from the Gambian Immigration prior to travel..

India.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via 32 designated airports or 5 designated seaports.. An Indian e-Tourist Visa may only be obtained twice within 1 calendar year.. Foreigners of Pakistani origin or who hold a Pakistani Passport are not eligible for an e-Visa. Foreigners who are not Pakistani nationals, but whose parents or grandparents (either paternal or maternal) were born in, or were permanent residents in Pakistan, are also not eligible for an e-Visa..

Ireland.notes: Visa-free for short stay UK visa holders, who have entered the UK on foot. They may use the time remaining on their current leave to enter Ireland..

Jordan.notes: Visa can be obtained upon arrival, at a fee of 40 JOD.. The visa is obtainable at most international ports of entry and land border crossings, except Allenby Bridge..

Kazakhstan.notes: 30 calendar days from the date of entry, for a total of 90 calendar days every 6 months..

Kenya.notes: Applications can be submitted up to 90 days prior to travel and must be submitted at least 3 days in advance.. eTA fee is 32.50 USD.. Proof of reservation at the hotel where visitors plan to stay is required (if staying with friends, an invitation letter is also acceptable).. Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries..

South Korea.notes: Visa free transit (up to 30 days) provided holding a valid U.S., Canada, Australia, New Zealand visa, and arriving from or departing to those countries.. Visa-free access for 30 days to Jeju Island.. Group tourists can only travel to the Gangwon-do region and the metropolitan area of South Korea, and the maximum stay is 15 days..

Kyrgyzstan.notes: Visa-free regime to be in force on 6 August 2021..

Lebanon.notes: In addition to a visa, an approval should be obtained from the Immigration department of the General Directorate of General Security (La Surete Generale)..

Madagascar.notes: For stays of 61 to 90 days, the visa fee is 59 USD..

Malawi.notes: Can extend for a total of 90 days..

Mexico.notes: Visa-free for holders of valid US, Schengen, Japanese, Canadian, or UK visas. Visa-free also for holders of US, Japanese, Canadian, UK, Schengen, Peru, Chilean, or Colombian residence permits..

Moldova.notes: Citizens holding a residence permit or a valid visa issued by one of the member states of the European Union or one of the parties to the Schengen Agreement can apply for an e-Visa..

Montenegro.notes: Visa free for holders of valid visa for Schengen area..

Morocco.notes: Vietnamese holding ordinary passports may apply for an e-Visa without further document requirements..

New Zealand.notes: Holders of an Australian Permanent Resident Visa or Resident Return Visa may be granted a New Zealand Resident Visa on arrival permitting indefinite stay (pursuant to the Trans-Tasman Travel Arrangement ), subject to meeting character requirements and obtaining an Electronic Travel Authority prior to departure..

North Macedonia.notes: Visa-free for Schengen multiple-entry visa or residence permit holders, 15 days upon every entry into the territory of the Republic of North Macedonia as long as the total length of stay does not exceed 90 days in any 180-day period..

Oman.notes: Visa not required for a 14-day visit if the visitor holds a valid visa from the United States, Canada, Australia, the United Kingdom, Schengen Agreement countries, or Japan..

Palau.notes: Can be extended twice only with a fee..

Romania.notes: Visa free for holders of valid visa for Schengen area..

Serbia.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period. Transfers allowed.. Visa-free for a maximum stay of 90 days for valid visa holders or residents of the European Union member states and the United States..

Seychelles.notes: Application can be submitted up to 30 days before travel.. Visitors must upload a reservation confirmation(s) for each visitor's location of stay in Seychelles.. Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries.. Payment of the fee (EUR 10) by credit or debit card.. Valid for one journey only and it expires once exit the country..

Solomon Islands.notes: Pre-arranged visa can be picked up on arrival..

South Sudan.notes: Obtainable online.. Printed visa authorization must be presented at the time of travel..

Suriname.notes: An entrance fee of USD 50 or EUR 50 must be paid online prior to arrival.. Multiple entry e-Visa is also available..

Tajikistan.notes: Visa not required for citizens over the age of 55 and they can stay for up to 14 days.. e-Visa holders can enter through all border points..

Turkmenistan.notes: When transiting between two non-bordering countries, visitors can obtain a Turkmenistan transit visa for a five-day stay. This must be applied for in advance at the Turkmenistan Embassy. Visitors must also submit copies of the visas for the country of entry into Turkmenistan and the country of departure from Turkmenistan. Visa fee is 20 USD..

United Kingdom.notes: Direct Airside Transit visa (DATV) and Visitor in Transit visa (TWOV) may not be required under certain conditions..

Uzbekistan.notes: Visa not required for citizens over the age of 55 and they can stay for up to 30 days.. 5-day visa-free transit at the international airports if holding a confirmed onward ticket for a flight to a third country..

Yemen.notes: Yemen introduced an e-Visa system for visitors who meet certain eligibility requirements (group travel of 10 or more people, business trips, and transit etc.)..

Eritrea outside Asmara.notes: To travel in the rest of the country, a Travel permit for Foreigners is required (20 Nakfa )..

Ascension Island.notes: From May 2015, Ascension Island government no longer issues entry visas for nationals of Vietnam..

Saint Helena.notes: Visitor are issued an entry permit valid for 183 days..

Tristan da Cunha.notes: Permission to land required for £ 15/30 (yacht/ship passenger) for Tristan da Cunha Island or £ 20 for Gough Island, Inaccessible Island or Nightingale Island..

Somaliland.notes: Visa on arrival can be obtained if you have letter of invitation from the government..

Sudan outside Khartoum.notes: All Foreigners traveling more than 25 kilometers outside of Khartoum must obtain a travel permit..

Iraqi Kurdistan.notes: If the guarantor applies and pays, the visitors may apply for an e-Visa. e-Visa for 30 days is available at Erbil and Sulaymaniyah airports..

Kish Island and Qeshm Island.notes: All tourists, may stay on Kish Island and Qeshm Island for 14 days or less without obtaining any visa..

Macau SAR, China.notes: Visitors must obtain a visa in advance through the Chinese diplomatic mission..

Maldives outside Malé.notes: Tourists are generally prohibited from visiting non-respect islande without the express permission of the Government of Maldives..

Mecca and Medina.notes: Non-Muslims and those following the Ahmadiyya religious movement are strictly prohibited from entry..

North Korea outside Pyongyang.notes: People are not allowed to leave the capital city, tourists can only leave the capital with a governmental tourist guide (no independent moving).

Palestine.notes: Arrival by sea to Gaza Strip is not allowed..

Taiwan (Province of China) (Province of.notes: Holders of Schengen visa are eligible to fill a special requirement form in order to be allowed for the visa free access.

Gorno-Badakhshan Autonomous Province.notes: OIVR permit required (20 TJS ) and another special permit (free of charge) is required for Lake Sarez..

Closed cities of Turkmenistan.notes: A special permit, issued prior to arrival by Ministry of Foreign Affairs, is required if visiting the following places: Atamurat, Cheleken, Dashoguz, Serakhs and Serhetabat..

Yemen outside Sanaa or Aden..notes: Special permission needed for travel outside Sanaa or Aden..

Abkhazia.notes: Tourists from all countries (except Georgia) can visit Abkhazia for a period not exceeding 24 hours as part of an organized tourist group..

Mount Athos.notes: Special permit required (4 days: € 25 for Orthodox visitors, € 35 for non-Orthodox visitors, € 18 for students). There is a visitors' quota: maximum 100 Orthodox and 10 non-Orthodox per day and women are not allowed..

Brest and Grodno.notes: Belarus has a visa-free regime of all foreign visitors going to the Brest recreation zone including Belovezhskaya Pushcha National Park for a period of up to 10 days..

Northern Cyprus.notes: Citizens of all countries may enter without a visa for up to 90 days except the citizens of Armenia, Nigeria and Syria..

UN Buffer Zone in Cyprus.notes: Access Permit is required for traveling inside the zone, except Civil Use Areas..

Faroe Islands.notes: If you don't normally need a visa for Denmark, you can visit the Faroe Islands visa-free under the same rules (90 days in a half year).. If you need a visa for Denmark, inform the embassy when you apply that you'll be visiting the Faroe Islands, as Schengen-area visas issued for the mainland don't apply to the Faroe Islands (or Greenland)..

Gibraltar.notes: Visa-free if you hold a diplomatic passport..

Guernsey.notes: Visa policy of United Kingdom are applies de facto..

Isle of Man.notes: Visa policy of United Kingdom are applies de facto..

Jan Mayen.notes: Permit issued by the local police required for staying for less than 24 hours.. Permit issued by the Norwegian Police for staying for more than 24 hours..

Jersey.notes: Visa policy of United Kingdom are applies de facto..

Closed cities of Russia.notes: Several closed cities and regions in Russia require special authorization..

South Ossetia.notes: To enter South Ossetia, visitors must have a multiple-entry visa for Russia and register their stay with the Migration Service of the Ministry of Internal Affairs within 3 days..

Svalbard.notes: The Svalbard Treaty grants treaty nationals equal right of abode as Norwegian nationals.. Non-treaty nationals may live and work indefinitely visa-free as well..

Anguilla.notes: In addition, holders of a valid visa or residence permit from the United States, Canada or the United Kingdom and holders of diplomatic passport don't require a visa..

British Virgin Islands.notes: Permanent residents of the United States, Canada or the United Kingdom don't require a visa..

French West Indies.notes: French West Indies refers to Martinique, Guadeloupe, Saint Martin and Saint Barthélemy.

Montserrat.notes: Multiple-entry e-Visa valid for 1 year can be obtained through the internet, prior to departure..

Turks and Caicos Islands.notes: Permanent residence or holders of valid Visas of the United States, Canada or the United Kingdom don't require a visa for a maximum stay of 90 days..

Christmas Islands.notes: Passports and Visas aren't required when travelling from the Australian mainland. However, photographic identification must be produced for clearance through customs and Immigration. Normal Australian customs and Immigration procedures apply when entry is made from outside Australia..

Macquarie Island.notes: A written authorisation of the Director of National Parks and Wildlife is required..

Norfolk Island.notes: From 1 July 2016 all movement between Norfolk Island and Australian mainland are considered as domestic movement, however all passenger are still required to carry passports or, for Australian citizens, some type of photographic identification and pass Customs and Immigration. Normal Australian Customs and Immigration procedures apply when entry is made from outside Australia. Passenger not carrying their passports aren't eligible to purchase duty-free goods on Norfolk Island..

Tokelau.notes: All visitors must obtain a permit to enter Tokelau from the Tokelau Apia Liaison Office in Apia, at least 2 weeks prior to travel. Tokelau can only be reached by boat from Samoa and a permit from the Samoan Immigration Authorities is required to leave and re-enter Samoa..

United States Minor Outlying Islands.notes: Special permits required for Baker Island, Howland Island, Jarvis Island, Johnston Atoll, Kingman Reef, Midway Atoll, Palmyra Atoll and Wake Island..

Galápagos.notes: 60 days; Visitors must pre-register to receive a 20 USD Transit Control Card (TCT)..

South Georgia and the South Sandwich Isl.notes: Pre-arrival permit from the Commissioner required (72 hours/1 mouth for £ 110/160)..

Antarctica.notes: Special permits required for Bouvet Island, British Antarctic Territory, French Southern and Antarctic Lands, Argentine Antarctica, Australian Antarctic Territory, Chilean Antarctic Territory, Heard Island and McDonald Islands, Peter I Island, Queen Maud Land, Ross Dependency..

Belize.notes: Visa-free for holders of valid visa for Schengen area up to 90 days or holders of multiple-entry US visa for up to 30 days..

Antigua and Barbuda.notes: Holders of a visa or residency issued by Canada, USA, United Kingdom or a Schengen Member State can obtain a visa upon arrival that costs USD 100 for a maximum of 30 days..

Belize.notes: Visa-free for holders of valid visa for Schengen area up to 90 days or holders of multiple-entry US visa for up to 30 days..

Bosnia and Herzegovina.notes: Visa free for holders of valid visa for Schengen area..

Bulgaria.notes: Visa free for holders of valid visa for Schengen area..

Colombia.notes: Visa free for holders of valid visa for Schengen area or the US..

Costa Rica.notes: Visa-free for holders of valid visa for Schengen area or the US..

Cyprus.notes: Visa-free for holders of valid visa for Schengen area..

Montenegro.notes: Visa free for holders of valid visa for Schengen area..

Romania.notes: Visa free for holders of valid visa for Schengen area..

Taiwan (Province of China) (Province of.notes: Holders of Schengen visa are eligible to fill a special requirement form in order to be allowed for the visa free access.

Ireland.notes: Visa-free for short stay UK visa holders, who have entered the UK on foot. They may use the time remaining on their current leave to enter Ireland..
